{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Aetheric disruption
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A major ritual caused a huge [[Aetheric disruption]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
